positive: A whimsical, stylized depiction of a mountain range silhouette filled with diverse flora and fauna. The main subjects include an ethereal flying fox or large manta ray, a bioluminescent fox curled in sleep, and delicate, stylized flowers growing around a crystalline river. The style is inspired by Japanese woodblock prints (Ukiyo-e) blended with modern nature illustration. Use deep indigo, emerald green, sapphire blue, and warm amber accents. Composition must be central, maintaining excellent contrast between the foreground silhouettes and the detailed, illuminated background. Studio lighting, highly detailed, vector art quality, perfect for screen printing on fabric.
